title: jasminum simplicifolium
intro: Jasminum simplicifolium, also known as the star jasmine or evening star, is a flowering vine native to China and Southeast Asia. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, including antiseptic and anti-inflammatory properties, which are attributed to its essential oil and flavonoids. The health benefits of Jasminum simplicifolium include treating respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and asthma, as well as its use in traditional Chinese medicine to reduce fever and alleviate headaches. Jasminum simplicifolium can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures for medicinal use, although it's essential to consult a healthcare professional before using it as a treatment.
